chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1815 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.13118/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Per learned A.A.G this petition has become infructuous. Be that as it may, the petitioner is unrepresented without intimation or justification. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
